---
title: "tutorial_v1.02"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{tutorial_v1.02}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

## Load libraries and set directory
```{r lib, echo=TRUE, results=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, eval=TRUE}
library(HiVE)
# Set working directory
getwd()
```

## Plot HiVE networks
```{r netbase, echo=TRUE, results=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, eval=TRUE}
# Base
hive_base()
# Annotation counts
hive_anno(enr_obj = d)
```
